metadata.description: ORTEX for Claude — the short-selling and market-intelligence data desks pay for.

plugins.name: ortex
plugins.description:
The short-selling and market-intelligence data professional desks pay for — inside Claude. Ask in plain English; no dashboards, no CSV exports.

Short interest, cost-to-borrow, days-to-cover, utilisation and squeeze signals. Options chains, Greeks and put/call sentiment. ORTEX stock and short scores. Fundamentals, prices, earnings and macro calendars. Even US Congressional trades — 27 tools across the full ORTEX dataset.

A bundled analyst skill teaches Claude to read it like a securities-lending desk: spotting squeeze setups, weighing cost-to-borrow against days-to-cover and utilisation, and turning raw feeds into a clean, decision-ready call.

Try 'is GME a short-squeeze setup right now?' or 'rank NVDA, AMD and PLTR by ORTEX short score.' More at mcp.ortex.com.
